docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, WYNNFORD , CO-TRUSTEE OF THE WYNNFORD KONG AND HOLLY KONG REVOCABLE TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, CAN MING DU, MIKE DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
